title: ticket attachments, brainstorm tunnel verify + wg-mesh keys
description:
## Summary

- **dev-flow-plan skill**: gains ticket attachment support (Linear attachments wired into plan creation) and a brainstorm tunnel verification step to confirm `brainstorm.mentolder.de` is reachable before kicking off sessions
- **wg-mesh peer config**: adds WireGuard keys and endpoints for korczewski nodes (`pk-hetzner-4`, `pk-hetzner-6`, `pk-hetzner-8`) so they can participate in the `wg-mesh` overlay
- **hetzner-node skill**: updated with lessons learned from the korczewski cluster reset — covers sealed-secrets keypair rotation, `env:fetch-cert` + `env:seal` sequencing, and `knowledge-secrets` conflict resolution

## Test plan

- [ ] Verify `dev-flow-plan` skill runs end-to-end with a ticket that has attachments
- [ ] Confirm brainstorm tunnel verify step passes when `brainstorm.mentolder.de` is up
- [ ] Check wg-mesh peers on korczewski nodes can ping mentolder mesh IPs
- [ ] Smoke-test `hetzner-node` skill against a fresh node bring-up

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
